positive: Minimalist, stylized representation of a mystical woodland creature, merging elements of a fox and a luna moth. The subject should have an elegant, flowing silhouette against a clean background. Focus on intricate line work, natural gold foil accents, and a deep jewel-toned palette (emerald, sapphire, amethyst). Composition must be central, suitable for a chest print, with a high contrast black outline. Style is a blend of Art Nouveau and Japanese woodblock print, achieving a sophisticated, vintage yet modern aesthetic. Flat graphic design, vector art quality, high detail.
negative: blur, noise, watermark, logo, text, signature, dirty, artifacts, cropped, bad anatomy, low detail, cartoon, photorealism
